zh.lifeSummary: Elias Gould於大約1246年出生在英國薩默塞特澤亞波洛。他於1273年與Matilda在英國英格蘭薩默塞特澤亞波洛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1315年在英國英格蘭享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elias Gould于大约1246年出生在英国薩默塞特澤亞波洛。他于1273年与Matilda在英国英格兰薩默塞特澤亞波洛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1315年在英国英格兰享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gould
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gold
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Emanuel, Meyer, Mayer, Hyman, Ari, Avram, Mendel, Moshe, Shraga, Aviva.

Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from German Gold, Yiddish gold ‘gold’. In North America it is often a shortened form of one of the many compound artificial names of which Gold is the first element.

English and German: from Middle English go(u)ld, or Old English and Old High German gold ‘gold’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for someone who worked in gold, i.e. a refiner, jeweler, or gilder, or as a nickname for someone who either had many gold possessions or bright yellow hair.

variants.name: Guild
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Perthshire): apparently a nickname for someone who played a prominent part in a medieval guild. It may, however, be a Scottish variant of   Gould  .

nameMeanings.name: Elias
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Greek form (used in the New Testament) of the name of the prophet   Elijah .  It is one of a number of Old Testament names which have come back into favour since the latter part of the 20th century.  See also  Ellis .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Elias Gould was born about 1246, in Seaborough, Somerset, England. He married Matilda in 1273, in Seaborough, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1315, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Elias Gould est né environ 1246, à Seaborough, Somerset, Angleterre. Il a épousé Matilda en 1273, à Seaborough, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1315, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elias Gould wurde um 1246 in Seaborough, Somerset, England geboren. Er hat 1273 in Seaborough, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Matilda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1315 im Alter von 71 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Elias Gould è nato il circa 1246 nel Seaborough, Somerset, England. Lui sposato Matilda nel 1273, nel Seaborough, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1315, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elias Gouldは約1246年にイギリスソメルセトセアボロウで生まれた。1273年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトセアボロウでMatildaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1315年にイギリスイギリスで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elias Gould(은)는 대략 1246년 영국 서머세트 시버루그h에서 태어났다. 그는 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 시버루그h에서 Matilda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1315년 영국 잉글랜드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elias Gould nasceu aproximadamente 1246, em Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Matilda em 1273, em Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1315, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Elias Gould родился около 1246 г. в местности сибороую, сомирсет, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda в 1273 г. в местности сибороую, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1315 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Elias Gould nació aproximadamente 1246, en Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra. Se casó con Matilda en 1273, en Seaborough, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1315, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
